name: Scrambled Eggs Benedict
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow the instructions on the sauce packet. The packet should weigh 1 1/4 ounces.
2. Mix the sauce as directed in a 2-cup glass measure. Microwave uncovered on high (100%), about 1 minute; stir. Continue microwaving until the mixture boils and thickens, approximately 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds.
3. Cook the bacon slices on high (100%) for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes, or until hot.
4. Beat the eggs in a 1-Quart casserole. Add the milk, chopped green peppers, salt, and pepper. Microwave uncovered on high (100%), stirring occasionally, for about 2 minutes.
5. Continue microwaving until the eggs are set but still moist, approximately 1 to 1 1/2 minutes.
6. Place the split English muffins cut-side up on a serving plate. Top each with bacon slices and a generous spoonful of the egg mixture. Pour any remaining sauce over the eggs.
7. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes until hot.
